short_summary: Tren de Aragua strike, Iran deal close
rationale: The US airstrike killing the Tren de Aragua gang leader is a new domestic security development with direct policy implications; the Iran deal remains unresolved but close, keeping oil market and geopolitical uncertainty elevated.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike
top_events.summary: Trump administration used military force against a foreign criminal organization, signaling an aggressive new posture on domestic gang threats; direct policy shift affecting immigration and security debate in the US.

top_events.title: Iran claims deal with US near; 'lots can still go wrong'
top_events.summary: A near-concluded US-Iran deal could ease oil prices and reduce Middle East military commitments for the US, but uncertainty remains high and continued Israeli strikes on Lebanon complicate the picture.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools for foreign nationals under US government order
top_events.summary: Continuation of federal AI security restrictions; no new qualitative escalation this cycle, remains active background policy affecting US tech sector.
